data.title: GREEN: Implement centrality caching and file count threshold bypass
data.description:
## Description

Add two performance optimizations to record-test-status.sh centrality scoring:

### 1. Per-file per-diff-hash caching
- After computing centrality for a file, cache the result keyed by (filepath, diff_hash)
- Cache location: $ARTIFACTS_DIR/centrality-cache-${DIFF_HASH}/
- On subsequent runs with same diff hash, read from cache instead of recomputing
- When diff hash changes, clean up old cache directories
- Follow the existing caching pattern in record-test-status.sh (test-gate-progress-${DIFF_HASH})

### 2. File count threshold bypass
- Add config key test_gate.file_count_threshold (default: 50) to .claude/dso-config.conf
- When staged file count exceeds threshold, skip centrality computation entirely
- Run full test suite directly (same path as high-centrality trigger)
- Log decision to $ARTIFACTS_DIR/centrality-log.jsonl with decision: "skipped_file_count"

### 3. JSONL logging
- Log centrality decisions to $ARTIFACTS_DIR/centrality-log.jsonl
- One JSON line per staged file: {file, centrality_score, threshold, decision}
- decision values: "associated_only", "full_suite", "skipped_no_sg", "skipped_file_count"

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh (modify — add caching, threshold, logging)
- .claude/dso-config.conf (modify — add test_gate.file_count_threshold key)
- .test-index (modify — remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test_gate.file_count_threshold key exists in dso-config.conf (commented example)
  Verify: grep -q 'test_gate.file_count_threshold' .claude/dso-config.conf
- [ ] Caching logic present in record-test-status.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'centrality-cache' plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] File count threshold check present
  Verify: grep -q 'file_count_threshold' plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] JSONL logging present
  Verify: grep -q 'centrality-log.jsonl' plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh
- [ ] RED marker removed from .test-index
  Verify: ! grep -q 'test_centrality_cached_per_diff_hash' .test-index
- [ ] All centrality tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/hooks/test-record-test-status-centrality.sh
